hero.title: Drive Your Dreams with Max Drive
hero.subtitle: Discover a premium selection of high-quality vehicles tailored to your lifestyle and budget. Performance, safety, and luxury in every mile.

about.title: Why Choose Max Drive?
about.text1: With over 15 years in the automotive industry, Max Drive has built a reputation for excellence, transparency, and customer satisfaction.
about.text2: Every vehicle in our showroom undergoes a rigorous 150-point inspection to ensure it meets our highest standards of quality.

inventory.title: Our Latest Inventory
inventory.subtitle: Browse our hand-picked selection of luxury and performance cars.

features.title: Premium Services
features.quality_desc: Every car is certified and inspected by our expert mechanics.
features.financing_desc: Tailored payment plans to fit your financial needs.
features.warranty_desc: Peace of mind with our comprehensive warranty coverage.
features.support_desc: Our dedicated team is always here to assist you.
